title: Jinn (disambiguation)
content:
__NOTOC__
'''Jinn''' may refer to the following individuals:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Qui-Gon Jinn]]''' a [[Jedi Master]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]]''' a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]
*'''[[Jinn Reeso]]''' as a professional Podracer pilot
*'''[[Jinn Skywalker]]''' the unreal, but dreamed-of son of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].

{{Disambig}}
